term: Come Out Better on the Other End
pronunciation: /kʌm aʊt ˈbɛtər ɑn ði ˈʌðər ɛnd/
englishDefinitions: To survive a difficult situation and end up in a better condition afterward.
To improve after going through a hard experience.
persianTranslation: در نهایت بهتر از آن وضعیت بیرون آمدن
از آن شرایط سالم‌تر/بهتر بیرون آمدن
examples: It was a tough year, but she came out better on the other end.
If we stay patient, the business may come out better on the other end.
After all the stress, he came out better on the other end than before.
